name: six-axis-compass
description: A political compass mapping six axes. Static PWA with zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.build: npm run sync-actors && npm run build:css && node scripts/build.js
scripts.dev: npm run sync-actors && npm run build:css && node scripts/build.js --watch
scripts.test: node tests/quiz.test.js && node tests/axes-order.test.js && node tests/trigrams.test.js && node tests/merch-url.test.js && node tests/api.test.js
